description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build .NET Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow should have two jobs: build-slice-compilers and pack-dotnet. The build-slice-compilers job should run on multiple platforms (macos-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-24.04, ubuntu-24.04-arm64), check out the repository, set up dependencies, build the slice2cs compiler, and upload the compiler artifact for each platform. The pack-dotnet job should run on windows-latest, depend on the build-slice-compilers job, check out the repository, download all compiler artifacts, and pack and upload .NET NuGet packages.
